message:
fix: store and use real target_id for initial tab

The initial tab was added with target_id="initial" which is not a
valid Chrome target ID. When trying to switch back to the first tab,
switchToTarget would fail because "initial" is not a real target.

Fix:
- Add current_target_id field to CdpClient
- Store target_id when attaching to page target
- Update target_id when switching targets
- Add getCurrentTargetId() getter
- Use real target_id when adding initial tab
